description.text: Must do's or highly recommended steps before you launch a project

body:0002.text: Before you publish a project, review this checklist to ensure nothing critical is missed. Completing these steps makes your project more engaging, easier to manage, and clearer for participants.

body:0005.text: You avoid rework after launch (e.g., editing access rights or fixing missing descriptions).

body:0006.text: Responsibilities are clear, someone is accountable for each aspect of the project.

body:0008.text: Double-check if all the user data relevant for your project is a required registration field

body:0009.text: User info relevant for your project should be asked during the platform registration flow.

body:0010.text: Customize project tags, areas and statuses

body:0011.text: Review and adjust tags, areas and ensure status handling is clear.

body:0012.text: Grant access to the right groups of users

body:0013.text: Also check if the info you need is asked during the platform registration flow.

body:0014.text: Add a timeline to your projects and a description to each project phase

body:0015.text: Don't leave the description of a timeline phase empty.

body:0016.text: Customize the input form (for ideation projects)

body:0017.text: You can customize the way to collect input in an ideation project.

body:0019.text: You can change the zoom level of and add layers to the map that shows in your project.

body:0020.text: Enhance project design with Content Builder

body:0021.text: Use flexible layouts, multi-media content and third-party embeds in your project descriptions.

body:0023.text: Define which automated emails people should or should not receive from your project.

body:0025.text: Distribute responsibilities internally. Each project can have its own manager.
